opinion.h4: LITTLE v. RHAY, PENITENTIARY SUPERINTENDENT. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WASHINGTON. No. 669, Misc. Decided November 14, 1966.
opinion.p: 68 Wash. 2d 353, 413 P.2d 15, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers submitted as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: BOARD SATANTA JOINT R. H. SCH. v. HASKELL CTY. PLAN., 385 U.S. 96 (1966)
opinion.p: 385 U.S. 96 BOARD OF SATANTA JOINT RURAL HIGH SCHOOL, DISTRICT NO. 2, ET AL. v. HASKELL COUNTY PLANNING BOARD ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF KANSAS. No. 560. Decided November 14, 1966.
Robert C. Londerholm, Attorney General of Kansas, and J. Richard Foth, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
